orank 80 → honest fixes

Every orank gap, triaged against the live site + code. We ship the real wins and decline the decorative / by-design / off-site ones — honesty over points. Filter below.

Shipped this PR: 5 fixes, ~+5 pts honest. The ceiling past ~85 is off-site — a Wikipedia/Wikidata entity, brand de-collision ("yonyon"), and a third-party citation corpus. No docs-site code crosses it; that's brand/press work.
